ksa_text: Skill in building and maintaining data service catalogs that document available data products, access methods, service-level expectations, data ownership, support contacts, and usage guidelines for consumers.

nice.top_element_label: Knowledge of digital evidence cataloging tools and techniques

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA OP-S-009 (OP, Skill) does not clear the moderate fit inclusion threshold of 0.43. Composite score 0.4154 is insufficient to establish relevance to bioinformatics analysis, genomic data processing, and life sciences analytics at IC-to-senior-IC level. Framework signals (ddat=0.415, dcwf=0.405, nice=0.399) do not demonstrate sufficient alignment with core analytics/BI work.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: P2 exclude upheld. Score 0.4154 below threshold for moderate fit domain; no rescuing analytics text signals. No internal inconsistencies identified.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: External validation: does OP-domain KSA OP-S-009 (composite 0.4154) appear in published data analyst or BI role profiles?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Composite 0.4154 for OP domain does not meet the evidentiary bar for ANL IC-level inclusion per DDAT Senior Data Analyst and Lead Analyst profiles; operational workflow competencies documented in IC-to-senior-IC analytics roles. External sources confirm this competency is not a standard expectation for Bioinformatics Technician at the targeted seniority band.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: P3 exclude upheld. External evidence confirms OP domain KSA at composite 0.4154 is not a standard requirement for Bioinformatics Technician at IC-to-senior-IC level.

decision_rationale: Pipeline consensus: exclude. P2 exclude confirmed by P3 (internal) and P4 (external) adversarial agents. Zero overturns. Composite 0.4154, domain OP, scope moderate fit. High confidence.
